storyOfTheWeek.title: MALUS - Clean Room as a Service
storyOfTheWeek.summary: MALUS - Clean Room as a Service Brutal satire on the whole vibe-porting license washing thing (previously): Finally, liberation from open source license obligations. Our proprietary AI robots independently recreate any open source project from scratch. The result? Legally distinct code with corporate-friendly licensing. No attribution. No copyleft. No problems.. I admit it took me a moment to confirm that this was a joke. Just too on-the-nose. Via Hacker News Tags: open-source, ai, generative-ai
